description: Dandeniya Arachchige Piyasiri Vs. Chairman of the Administrative Appeals Tribunal and Others Dandeniya Arachchige Piyasiri Vs. Chairman of the Administrative Appeals Tribunal and Others View More before Hon. Dr. D. F. H. Gunawardhana, J.
parties: Dandeniya Arachchige Piyasiri Vs. Chairman of the Administrative Appeals Tribunal and Others Dandeniya Arachchige Piyasiri Vs. Chairman of the Administrative Appeals Tribunal and Others View More
judgement_by: Hon. Dr. D. F. H. Gunawardhana, J.
keywords: Two Petitioners who went on surveillance patrol on the directions given by the OIC, arrested a person with 400 grams of cannabis; after causing him to be produced before the Magistrate on a B-report signed by the OIC, later alleged that the two Petitioners having seized and arrested two accused with 10kg of cannabis, had released one with 9kg and 600g of cannabis on accepting a bribe. After inquiry, their services were terminated, with appeals refused by PSC and AAT; the same was challenged, and Court held that they were convicted without any sufficient evidence, and therefore, writs lie.
legistation: The Constitution of the Democratic Socialist Republic of Sri Lanka
